jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Apollo Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Apollo Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Apollo Hospitals:
Apollo Hospitals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Hospitals!
